Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to go through each case and identify which activities are repeated Lets look at the log case by case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Starting with Case C001 Verify Documents twice Next Case C002 Call Customer twice Case C003 Verify Documents twice

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So Verify Documents happens twice here The first time it is when the agent checks identity documents but finds them incomplete The second time it is after the customer uploads the requested ID scan So the context changes based on whether its the initial verification or a reverification after additional info

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Here Call Customer occurs twice The first call is to clarify an account discrepancy and the second is a follow up to confirm adjustments So the purpose of the call changes initial clarification vs follow up confirmation

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Similar to C001 Verify Documents happens twice First physical verification at the branch then reverification after an internal account adjustment So again initial vs reverification

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the recurring activities are Verify Documents in C001 and C003 and Call Customer in C002

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For Verify Documents First occurrence Initial Document Verification Second occurrence Re Verification of Documents

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For Call Customer in C002 First Call Customer for Discrepancy Clarification Second Call Customer for Follow up Confirmation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This works because both first verifications are initial checks and both second ones are re checks even though the reasons differ post upload vs post adjustment The key is that its a reverification after some intervening step

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The first call is initiated to clarify a discrepancy in the customers account The second call is a follow up to confirm that adjustments made internally were correctly applied

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the only activities to rename are Verify Documents all first occurrences Initial Document Verification all second occurrences Re Verification of Documents and Call Customer in C002 first Call Customer Discrepancy Clarification second Call Customer Follow up Confirmation
